name: Chocolate Cappuccino Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place foil bake cups in muffin pans; set aside.
3. Prepare cake mix following package directions for cupcakes, adding 2 tablespoons instant coffee before mixing.
4. Fill bake cups 2/3 full with cake batter.
5. Bake according to package directions until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean (18-20 minutes).
6. Cool.
7. Dissolve remaining instant coffee in hot water; stir frosting into mixture until smooth.
8. Frost cupcakes.
9. In a small microwave-safe dish, stirring once, microwave chocolate morsels and oil on HIGH power for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes until chocolate is melted.
10. Drizzle melted chocolate over frosted cupcakes.
11. When chocolate is set, place cupcakes on a platter; set aside.
12. Wrap the platter with Reynolds crystal color plastic wrap, crisscrossing two long sheets and tucking the sides together at the top.
13. Tie with ribbon.
